acceptance_checks.given: eidolons.yaml has a context: block (ECM on) and claude-code is a wired host
acceptance_checks.then: .claude/settings.json .statusLine.command == "eidolons statusline render" and eidolons.lock context.statusline_managed == true

acceptance_checks.given: .claude/settings.json already has a foreign statusLine (e.g. command "starship prompt")
acceptance_checks.then: .claude/settings.json is byte-unchanged (sha256 before == after) and eidolons.lock context.statusline_managed == false

acceptance_checks.given: eidolons harness install has already run once with ECM on + claude-code wired
acceptance_checks.when: eidolons harness install runs a second time
acceptance_checks.then: .claude/settings.json is byte-identical across both runs (jq -cS compare)

acceptance_checks.given: eidolons.lock records context.statusline_managed: true after install
acceptance_checks.then: the statusLine key is deleted from .claude/settings.json and sibling keys (hooks, other top-level keys) survive intact

acceptance_checks.given: eidolons.lock records context.statusline_managed: false (a foreign statusLine was left don't-clobbered at install)
acceptance_checks.then: the foreign statusLine is left byte-unchanged (sha256 before == after)

acceptance_checks.given: a realistic Claude Code statusline stdin payload carrying context_window.used_percentage
